raw_consumer_statement: I filled a dispute with with Citi Bank on XX/XX/year>. Citi bank reports the dispute has been " Resolved '', however, I have tried on three separate occasions to get a copy of the merchant 's response to my dispute and a copy of the dispute I submitted to Citi Bank. Each time I call Citi Banks says they will e-mail me the requested information and they confirm the e-mail address, however, the never send the requested information. Each time I call the Citi Bank agents acknowledge the information from my previous request has not been sent, they go through the same process as the previous agent and say the information will be received in 24 to 48 hours. The Case ID ( assigned by Citi Bank ) for which I'm requesting the information described above is XXXX. In addition to Citi Bank refusing to send the information requested above, it is also not available via my on-line account nor has any information regarding this dispute been received via the mail. The automated voice information regarding this dispute at Citi Bank is incorrect. The information regarding this dispute at Citi Bank via my on-line account has links which when clicked on go to nowhere. As a consumer it sure appears Citi Bank is going out of their way to make things difficult for me in this matter.
